About us /
Customer service /
Online appointment scheduling

Online appointment scheduling

Connect with us.

Schedule time to talk with a banker virtually, over the phone or in person.

What would you like to discuss?

Personal banking

Set up time to talk about your accounts or open a new one, ask about personal loans and more.

Make a personal appointment

Business banking

Book time to open a business account, learn about products and services, credit cards, business financing and more.

Make a business appointment

We offer several ways to meet

Phone appointments

Schedule a time that works for you to talk with a banker, whether you’re at home or on-the-go.

In-person appointments

Meet your dedicated banker in-person and get your questions answered at a time of your choosing.

Virtual appointments

Have a face-to-face meeting with your banker without having to leave home. With the added benefits of Cobrowse, your banker can even view your screen to help.

Useful tools to help you connect

Cobrowse

With Cobrowse, your banker can view your screen to help show you where to go and what to do. Use Cobrowse remotely or when you’re meeting in-person. Learn more about Cobrowse.

Join the line

Looking for an appointment sooner? Check your branch's availability during the booking process. If available, you can save your spot in line and we'll send you a text when it's your turn to meet with a banker today.

U.S. Bank Smart Assistant®

Just have a quick question? Let our Smart Assistant help you in mobile or online banking.

Learn more about Smart Assistant

Skip the appointment and open an account online.

Explore personal bank accounts, business bank accounts and even begin an online application all on usbank.com or, if you’re already a client, the U.S. Bank Mobile App.

Suspect fraud?

If you notice an unauthorized transaction or think something’s not right with your account, let us know immediately at 877-595-6256. We accept relay calls.

Learn about digital security

Get goals coaching, for free.

A goals coach uses personalized tools and resources to help you explore what truly matters in life – financial or not.

Learn more about goals coaching
Start of disclosure content

Disclosures

Investment and insurance products and services including annuities are:
Not a deposit • Not FDIC insured • May lose value • Not bank guaranteed • Not insured by any federal government agency.

U.S. Bank, U.S. Bancorp Advisors, and their representatives do not provide tax or legal advice. Each individual's tax and financial situation is unique. Clients should consult their tax or legal advisor for advice and information concerning their particular situation.

Brokerage and investment advisory products and services are offered by U.S. Bancorp Advisors, LLC, an SEC-registered broker-dealer, investment adviser, member FINRA and SIPC, and subsidiary of U.S. Bancorp and affiliate of U.S. Bank, N.A. 

For U.S. Bank:

U.S. Bank is not responsible for and does not guarantee the products, services or performance of U.S. Bancorp Advisors.

Mortgage, home equity and credit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Deposit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC.

The creditor and issuer of U.S. Bank credit cards is U.S. Bank National Association, pursuant to separate licenses from Visa U.S.A. Inc., MasterCard International Inc. and American Express. American Express is a federally registered service mark of American Express.
